{{Quote|Stormtroopers! They've cut us off! We can't get out this way!|Paxin|<ref name="world" />}}
'''Paxin''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agent operating on the "Gambler's World" of [[Vorzyd V/Legends|Vorzyd V]] during the era of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], Paxin was captured by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] along with prominent Rebel leaders [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], and a [[Selonian/Legends|Selonian]] fellow operative named [[Falud]]. Skywalker's two [[Droid/Legends|droids]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], infiltrated the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] where the Rebels were being held and freed them from their bonds, allowing them to overpower their [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] guards and attempt to blast their way free. Although Falud was killed in the escape, Paxin managed to make it off the ship with Skywalker and Organa. Paxin later attended a meeting with Skywalker, Organa and local Rebel cell leader [[Sanglui]], where they drew straws to determine which of them would rendezvous with a highly placed [[Natala Vanden|member]] of the Vorzyd V government who was clandestinely supporting the Rebel cause.<ref name="world" />

==Behind the scenes==
Paxin made his first and only appearance in the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity in ''[[Gambler's World]]'', a [[Star Wars (comic strip)|comic strip]] story arc written and illustrated by [[Russ Manning]] and released in [[1979]].<ref name="world" />
